title: Positive and Negative
instruction: Choose the correct answer about positive and negative numbers.

questions.question: You have £30. What is your balance?
You owe the bank £50. Your balance is...
What does 'in credit' mean?
options: You have money in your account
questions.answer: You have money in your account

questions.question: What does 'overdrawn' mean?
options: You have spent more than you have
questions.answer: You have spent more than you have
